summary: Plan gate cannot approve until the migration rollback evidence is restored.

requiredChanges.description: Add rollback evidence for the approved task before re-submitting the plan gate.
requiredChanges.evidence: The task requires negative assertions and static-only guidance; no rollback/scope evidence was cited in the report lines 34-40.
requiredChanges.recommendedNextAction: Revise the feedback guidance and clarify the static scope before advancing the target phase.

suggestions.description: Keep optional suggestions separate from blocking fixes so the agent can prioritize safely.
